api.v1.UpdateConversationActionResponse.description: UpdateConversationActionResponse is returned after the action is performed.

api.v1.MarkAsReadRequest.name: MarkAsReadRequest
api.v1.MarkAsReadRequest.description: MarkAsReadRequest marks messages as read up to a given message ID.

fields.name: up_to_message_id
fields.description:
Mark all messages up to and including this message ID as read.
Must be >= current last_read_message_id (cannot go backwards).

api.v1.MarkAsReadResponse.name: MarkAsReadResponse
api.v1.MarkAsReadResponse.description: MarkAsReadResponse is returned after the read position is updated.

shared.v1.ErrorDetail.name: ErrorDetail
shared.v1.ErrorDetail.description:
ErrorDetail is the standard error payload attached to connect.Error details.
It is the sole mechanism for clients to identify and handle errors.

Full error code definitions: docs/designs/d12-error-codes.md
Go constants: internal/xerr/

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Numeric business error code. Client uses this for programmatic handling.

fields.name: error_name
fields.description: Error name (readable identifier, e.g. "INVALID_TOKEN"). For logging.

shared.v1.HeartbeatPing.name: HeartbeatPing
shared.v1.HeartbeatPing.description:
HeartbeatPing is an empty keepalive frame sent by the client at
regular intervals. Used by both user and agent WebSocket connections.

shared.v1.HeartbeatPong.name: HeartbeatPong
shared.v1.HeartbeatPong.description: HeartbeatPong is the server response to a HeartbeatPing.

fields.name: server_time
fields.description:
Server timestamp (Unix ms). Clients can use this for clock drift
estimation.

shared.v1.GatewayAuthResponse.name: GatewayAuthResponse
shared.v1.GatewayAuthResponse.description:
GatewayAuthResponse carries the authentication result for both user
and agent WebSocket connections.

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: Authenticated user ID (for agents this is agent_user_id).

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Business error code on failure (from ErrorDetail code space).

shared.v1.GatewayErrorFrame.name: GatewayErrorFrame
shared.v1.GatewayErrorFrame.description:
GatewayErrorFrame carries connection-level error information using
the unified ErrorDetail error code system (D12).

fields.name: error
fields.description: Structured error detail with error_code and error_name.

fields.name: fatal
fields.description: Whether the client should close the connection after this error.

shared.v1.GroupContent.name: GroupContent
shared.v1.GroupContent.description:
GroupContent carries structured group event data as the body of a
system message (MessageType = GROUP) delivered to a GROUP conversation.
Each event type has its own strongly-typed payload.

The oneof field implicitly identifies the event type, so no separate
enum is needed. Clients and agents switch on the oneof case to handle
the appropriate in-chat system notification.

fields.name: group_id
fields.description:
Group ID this event belongs to, allowing update consumers to
identify the group without deriving it from conversation_id.

fields.name: member_joined
fields.description: Members joined the group (user or agent).

fields.name: member_left
fields.description: A member voluntarily left the group.

fields.name: member_removed
fields.description: A member was removed from the group by the owner.

fields.name: group_info_changed
fields.description: Group metadata was changed (name, avatar, description, etc.).

shared.v1.MemberJoinedEvent.name: MemberJoinedEvent
shared.v1.MemberJoinedEvent.description:
MemberJoinedEvent is produced when members (users or agents) join a
group. Supports batch joins: group creation and multi-invite produce
a single event containing all member info, so clients render one
"A, B, C joined" message instead of multiple individual messages.
Delivered as a system message to the group conversation.

fields.name: members
fields.description: Members who joined in this batch.

fields.name: inviter
fields.description: The inviter who added these members (absent for group creation).

shared.v1.MemberLeftEvent.name: MemberLeftEvent
shared.v1.MemberLeftEvent.description:
MemberLeftEvent is produced when a member voluntarily leaves a group.
Delivered as a system message to the group conversation.

shared.v1.MemberRemovedEvent.name: MemberRemovedEvent
shared.v1.MemberRemovedEvent.description:
MemberRemovedEvent is produced when a member (user or agent) is removed
by the group owner. Unified event replacing the old MemberKickedEvent,
AgentRemovedEvent, KickedFromGroupEvent, and RemovedFromGroupEvent.

Dual delivery:
- GROUP conversation: visible to all remaining members.
- Removed member's update box: via RemovedFromGroupEvent SnUpdate (the member is no longer in the group).

fields.name: operator
fields.description: The owner who performed the removal.

shared.v1.GroupInfoChangedEvent.name: GroupInfoChangedEvent
shared.v1.GroupInfoChangedEvent.description:
GroupInfoChangedEvent is produced when group metadata is updated
(name, avatar, description, or other settings). Delivered as a system
message to the group conversation. Clients obtain the latest values
from related_groups in the push event.

fields.name: operator
fields.description: The operator who made the change.

shared.v1.MessageEntity.name: MessageEntity
shared.v1.MessageEntity.description: MessageEntity represents a rich text annotation using offset + length.

shared.v1.MessageBody.name: MessageBody
shared.v1.MessageBody.description:
MessageBody carries the message type and polymorphic content.
All message content variants are included, enabling both users and
agents to receive and parse every message type.

fields.name: group
fields.description: Group event content (delivered to group conversations).

shared.v1.TextContent.name: TextContent
shared.v1.TextContent.description: TextContent carries plain text message data.

fields.name: entities
fields.description: Rich text entities (@mentions, URLs, phone numbers, etc.).

shared.v1.FileContent.name: FileContent
shared.v1.FileContent.description: FileContent carries file attachment message data.

shared.v1.MarkdownContent.name: MarkdownContent
shared.v1.MarkdownContent.description: MarkdownContent carries markdown formatted message data.

shared.v1.CardContent.name: CardContent
shared.v1.CardContent.description:
CardContent carries an Adaptive Card message payload.
The card_json field contains a valid Adaptive Card JSON conforming to
https://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json

Server treats card_json as an opaque payload: it validates JSON syntax
and enforces a 50 KB size limit, but does NOT validate against the
Adaptive Card schema. Rendering is entirely the client's responsibility.

Interaction:
- Action.OpenUrl: handled client-side (open browser/webview).
- Action.Submit: client sends SubmitCardAction RPC with the action's data payload. Server forwards to the agent via webhook.
- Action.ShowCard / Action.ToggleVisibility: handled client-side.

fields.name: card_json
fields.description:
Adaptive Card JSON payload.
Must be valid JSON and ≤ 50 KB.

fields.name: fallback_text
fields.description: Plain text fallback for clients that cannot render Adaptive Cards.

shared.v1.StreamContent.name: StreamContent
shared.v1.StreamContent.description:
StreamContent carries streaming message data (e.g. agent real-time
generation). Delivered via Update push on the long connection.

The stream is uniquely identified by message_id (assigned when the
agent calls SendMessage with type=STREAM). Each delta carries a seq
number for dedup and ordering.

Lifecycle: 1. START: Server creates the message record (assigns message_id), pushes StreamContent with phase=START. No text content yet. 2. DELTA: Server pushes incremental text fragments via Update push. Deltas are NOT persisted; they are ephemeral push-only payloads. 3. END: Server persists the final accumulated text into the message record and pushes phase=END with the complete content. 4. ERROR: Generation failed. Server persists the error state.

Recovery after disconnect / app restart: Clients must track locally which stream messages have not reached a terminal phase (END or ERROR). On reconnect, call MessageService.GetMessage for each incomplete stream. The returned StreamContent reflects the current server-side state:
- phase=END + accumulated_text: generation finished while offline.
- phase=ERROR: generation failed.
- phase=DELTA: still generating; client resumes receiving deltas from the long connection. Use accumulated_text as the baseline and append subsequent deltas.

fields.name: seq
fields.description:
Delta sequence number (agent-side auto-increment, starting from 1).
Server uses this for dedup and gap detection. Only meaningful in
DELTA phase pushes; 0 for START/END/ERROR.

fields.name: delta
fields.description: Incremental text fragment. Only meaningful in DELTA pushes.

fields.name: accumulated_text
fields.description:
Accumulated full text up to this point. Populated by the server in:
- END phase: the complete final content.
- ERROR phase: partial content generated before the error.
- HTTP query (GetMessage): current accumulated content regardless of phase, enabling clients to recover after disconnect.
Empty in real-time DELTA pushes (clients accumulate locally).

fields.name: entities
fields.description:
Rich text entities (@mentions, URLs, etc.) for the accumulated text.
Only populated in END phase and HTTP query responses. Empty in
START, DELTA, and ERROR phases.

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Error description. Only populated in ERROR phase.

shared.v1.ReplyContext.name: ReplyContext
shared.v1.ReplyContext.description: ReplyContext defines the context of a replied message.

fields.name: content_preview
fields.description: Content preview of the replied message (first 100 chars).

shared.v1.MessageEnvelope.name: MessageEnvelope
shared.v1.MessageEnvelope.description: MessageEnvelope is the unified message representation.

fields.name: sender_id
fields.description:
Sender ID (user_id or agent_user_id). For group event messages
(GROUP), sender_id is 0. For recalled messages, sender_id
remains the original sender.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Last content modification time (Unix ms). Set on edit or recall.

fields.name: edited
fields.description: Whether the message has been edited. Not set for recalls.

shared.v1.RecalledContent.name: RecalledContent
shared.v1.RecalledContent.description:
RecalledContent replaces the original message body when a message is
recalled by its sender. The envelope's message_id and sender_id remain
unchanged. Clients resolve the sender nickname from their local user
cache to render "Alice recalled a message".

shared.v1.SnUpdate.name: SnUpdate
shared.v1.SnUpdate.description:
SnUpdate is a sequenced update delivered to a user's update box.
Each update carries a monotonically increasing sn. Clients detect
gaps by comparing received sn with local_sn + 1.

fields.name: sn
fields.description: Sequence number in the user's update stream.

fields.name: user_block_toggled
fields.description: A user was blocked or unblocked.

fields.name: conversation_action
fields.description: A conversation action was performed (mute, unmute, delete).

fields.name: read_receipt
fields.description: A read receipt update for multi-device sync.

fields.name: friend_request_sent
fields.description: A friend request was sent by the current user (multi-device sync).

fields.name: contact_alias_updated
fields.description: A contact alias was updated (multi-device sync).

fields.name: removed_from_group
fields.description: A member (user or agent) was removed from a group by the owner.

fields.name: group_dissolved
fields.description:
Field 15 was KickedFromGroupEvent (removed, unified into RemovedFromGroupEvent).
A group was dissolved by its owner.

fields.name: contact_added
fields.description: A contact was added directly (agent via AddContact).

shared.v1.NonSnUpdate.name: NonSnUpdate
shared.v1.NonSnUpdate.description:
NonSnUpdate is a non-sequenced update pushed in real time but not
persisted in the update box. Clients do not track sn for these.

fields.name: card_action_answer
fields.description: Card action answer (toast/alert from agent, ephemeral).

shared.v1.CardActionAnswer.name: CardActionAnswer
shared.v1.CardActionAnswer.description:
CardActionAnswer carries the agent's response to a card action.
Pushed as NonSnUpdate to the user who submitted the action.
Gateway maps this to a CardActionAnswerPush frame.

fields.name: show_alert
fields.description: Whether to show as alert dialog (true) or toast (false).

shared.v1.UpdateState.name: UpdateState
shared.v1.UpdateState.description: UpdateState holds the server's current sync state for a user.

fields.name: latest_sn
fields.description: The latest sn in the user's update stream.

shared.v1.FriendRequestReceivedEvent.name: FriendRequestReceivedEvent
shared.v1.FriendRequestReceivedEvent.description:
FriendRequestReceivedEvent is produced when a friend request is sent.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the target user's update box.
User info for from_user_id is provided via related_users in the
Update wrapper.

shared.v1.FriendRequestAcceptedEvent.name: FriendRequestAcceptedEvent
shared.v1.FriendRequestAcceptedEvent.description:
FriendRequestAcceptedEvent is produced when a friend request is accepted.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to both parties' update boxes.
User info for the peer is provided via related_users in the
Update wrapper.

shared.v1.FriendRequestRejectedEvent.name: FriendRequestRejectedEvent
shared.v1.FriendRequestRejectedEvent.description:
FriendRequestRejectedEvent is produced when a friend request is rejected.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to both parties' update boxes.

shared.v1.FriendRequestSentEvent.name: FriendRequestSentEvent
shared.v1.FriendRequestSentEvent.description:
FriendRequestSentEvent is produced when the current user sends a friend
request. Delivered to the sender's own update box (multi-device sync).

shared.v1.ContactAliasUpdatedEvent.name: ContactAliasUpdatedEvent
shared.v1.ContactAliasUpdatedEvent.description:
ContactAliasUpdatedEvent is produced when a contact alias is changed.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the caller's own update box only
(multi-device sync).

fields.name: contact_user_id
fields.description: Contact user ID whose alias was changed.

fields.name: new_alias
fields.description: New alias value. Empty means alias was cleared.

shared.v1.UsernameChangedEvent.name: UsernameChangedEvent
shared.v1.UsernameChangedEvent.description:
UsernameChangedEvent is produced when a user sets their username.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the user's own update box only
(multi-device sync). Contacts learn the new username on demand.

shared.v1.ContactDeletedEvent.name: ContactDeletedEvent
shared.v1.ContactDeletedEvent.description:
ContactDeletedEvent is produced when a contact is removed.
Single-sided: delivered as an SnUpdate to the caller's own update box
only (multi-device sync). The other party is NOT notified.

fields.name: peer_user_id
fields.description: User ID of the removed contact.

shared.v1.ContactAddedEvent.name: ContactAddedEvent
shared.v1.ContactAddedEvent.description:
ContactAddedEvent is produced when a user adds an agent as a contact
via AddContact. Delivered to the caller's own update box (multi-device sync).

fields.name: peer_user_id
fields.description: User ID of the added agent.

shared.v1.UserBlockToggledEvent.name: UserBlockToggledEvent
shared.v1.UserBlockToggledEvent.description:
UserBlockToggledEvent is produced when a user blocks or unblocks another.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the operator's own update box only
(for multi-device sync). The target user is NOT notified.

fields.name: target_user_id
fields.description: User ID of the target user.

fields.name: is_blocked
fields.description: True if blocked, false if unblocked.

shared.v1.UserProfileUpdatedEvent.name: UserProfileUpdatedEvent
shared.v1.UserProfileUpdatedEvent.description:
UserProfileUpdatedEvent is produced when a user updates their profile.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the user's own update box only (multi-device
sync). Contacts refresh cached profile data on demand (via message
denormalized user info or by viewing the contact detail page).

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: User ID whose profile was updated.

fields.name: new_nickname
fields.description: Changed fields and their new values. Only changed fields are included.

fields.name: new_avatar_url
fields.description: New avatar URL (present only if avatar was changed).

fields.name: new_signature
fields.description: New signature (present only if signature was changed).

shared.v1.ConversationActionEvent.name: ConversationActionEvent
shared.v1.ConversationActionEvent.description:
ConversationActionEvent is produced when a user performs a conversation
management action (mute, unmute, delete). Delivered as an SnUpdate
to the operator's own update box only (for multi-device sync).
Other participants are NOT notified.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Action that was performed (MUTE, UNMUTE, DELETE).

fields.name: clear_messages
fields.description: Whether message history was cleared. Only present when action = DELETE.

shared.v1.MessageDeletedEvent.name: MessageDeletedEvent
shared.v1.MessageDeletedEvent.description:
MessageDeletedEvent is produced when a user deletes messages locally
(DeleteMessages or DeleteHistory). Delivered as an SnUpdate to the
operator's own update box only (for multi-device sync).
Other participants are NOT notified.

fields.name: message_ids
fields.description: Deleted message IDs. Empty when up_to_message_id is set.

fields.name: up_to_message_id
fields.description:
Delete all messages up to and including this ID. Zero when
message_ids is set.

shared.v1.ReadReceiptEvent.name: ReadReceiptEvent
shared.v1.ReadReceiptEvent.description:
ReadReceiptEvent is produced when a user marks messages as read.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to the reader's own update box only
(for multi-device sync). The peer is NOT notified.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.description: Conversation ID where messages were read.

fields.name: last_read_message_id
fields.description: Read up to this message ID (inclusive).

fields.name: read_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the read occurred (Unix ms).

shared.v1.RemovedFromGroupEvent.name: RemovedFromGroupEvent
shared.v1.RemovedFromGroupEvent.description:
RemovedFromGroupEvent is delivered as an SnUpdate to the removed
member's (user or agent) update box when they are removed from a
group by the owner. Unified event for both user kicks and agent removals.

fields.name: group_id
fields.description: Group ID the member was removed from.

fields.name: operator_id
fields.description: User ID of the operator who performed the removal.

shared.v1.GroupDissolvedEvent.name: GroupDissolvedEvent
shared.v1.GroupDissolvedEvent.description:
GroupDissolvedEvent is produced when the group owner dissolves the group.
Delivered as an SnUpdate to every member's update box.

fields.name: operator_id
fields.description: User ID of the owner who dissolved the group.

shared.v1.AgentStatusChangedEvent.name: AgentStatusChangedEvent
shared.v1.AgentStatusChangedEvent.description:
AgentStatusChangedEvent is produced when an agent is deleted by its
developer. Delivered as an SnUpdate to all users who have added this
agent as a contact.

api.v1.ClientFrame.name: ClientFrame
api.v1.ClientFrame.description:
ClientFrame is the transport-agnostic upstream envelope. The long
connection is a push-only channel — clients send only authentication
and heartbeat frames upstream. All business requests go through
Connect RPC (HTTP).

fields.name: request_id
fields.description:
Client-generated correlation ID. The server echoes this ID in the
corresponding ServerFrame response so the client can match them.

fields.name: auth_request
fields.description: Connection authentication. Server responds with ServerFrame.auth_response.

fields.name: heartbeat_ping
fields.description: Heartbeat ping. Server responds with ServerFrame.heartbeat_pong.

api.v1.ServerFrame.name: ServerFrame
api.v1.ServerFrame.description:
ServerFrame is the transport-agnostic downstream envelope. Every message
sent by the server on the long connection is wrapped in a ServerFrame.

For response frames (auth_response, heartbeat_pong), the request_id
matches the originating ClientFrame.request_id.
For push frames (update, error), the server generates a unique
request_id.

fields.name: request_id
fields.description:
Correlation ID. Echoed from ClientFrame.request_id for responses,
server-generated for pushes.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error response or connection-level error push.

fields.name: card_action_answer
fields.description: Card action answer push (toast/alert from agent).

api.v1.AuthRequest.name: AuthRequest
api.v1.AuthRequest.description: AuthRequest is the long-connection authentication request frame.

api.v1.Update.name: Update
api.v1.Update.description:
Update wraps an SnUpdate or NonSnUpdate with related entity info
for client-side rendering without extra lookups.

fields.name: users
fields.description: Related user info referenced by the update (sender, peer, operator, etc.).

fields.name: groups
fields.description: Related group info referenced by the update (for group events).

fields.name: sn_update
fields.description: Sequenced update (persisted in the user's update box).

api.v1.CardActionAnswerPush.name: CardActionAnswerPush
api.v1.CardActionAnswerPush.description:
CardActionAnswerPush is pushed when an agent responds to an Adaptive
Card Action.Submit via AnswerCardAction. The client displays the text
as a toast or alert dialog depending on show_alert.
This is an ephemeral notification, not persisted as a message.

fields.name: action_id
fields.description: Action ID that this answer corresponds to.

fields.name: show_alert
fields.description: Whether to show as alert dialog (true) or toast (false).

fields.name: avatar_url
fields.description: Group avatar URL. Empty string uses system default avatar.

fields.name: member_ids
fields.description:
Initial member user IDs to invite (excluding the creator who is
added automatically). At least 2 members required (group minimum
is 3 including the creator). Max group size is 200 including the
creator.

api.v1.CreateGroupResponse.name: CreateGroupResponse
api.v1.CreateGroupResponse.description: CreateGroupResponse contains the created group info.

api.v1.DissolveGroupResponse.name: DissolveGroupResponse
api.v1.DissolveGroupResponse.description: DissolveGroupResponse is returned after group dissolution.

api.v1.UpdateGroupNameResponse.name: UpdateGroupNameResponse
api.v1.UpdateGroupNameResponse.description: UpdateGroupNameResponse is returned after name update.

api.v1.UpdateGroupAvatarResponse.name: UpdateGroupAvatarResponse
api.v1.UpdateGroupAvatarResponse.description: UpdateGroupAvatarResponse is returned after avatar update.

api.v1.UpdateGroupDescriptionResponse.name: UpdateGroupDescriptionResponse
api.v1.UpdateGroupDescriptionResponse.description: UpdateGroupDescriptionResponse is returned after description update.

api.v1.InviteMembersRequest.name: InviteMembersRequest
api.v1.InviteMembersRequest.description:
InviteMembersRequest invites users or agents to the group.
The server auto-detects member type by looking up account_type.

fields.name: member_ids
fields.description:
User IDs to invite (can include both users and agents).
Server enforces max group size and max agent count.

api.v1.InviteMembersResponse.name: InviteMembersResponse
api.v1.InviteMembersResponse.description: InviteMembersResponse is returned after member invitation.

api.v1.RemoveMemberRequest.name: RemoveMemberRequest
api.v1.RemoveMemberRequest.description: RemoveMemberRequest removes a member (user or agent) from the group.

fields.name: target_id
fields.description: Target member user ID (can be a user or agent).

api.v1.RemoveMemberResponse.name: RemoveMemberResponse
api.v1.RemoveMemberResponse.description: RemoveMemberResponse is returned after member removal.

api.v1.LeaveGroupRequest.name: LeaveGroupRequest
api.v1.LeaveGroupRequest.description: LeaveGroupRequest allows a member to leave.

api.v1.LeaveGroupResponse.name: LeaveGroupResponse
api.v1.LeaveGroupResponse.description: LeaveGroupResponse is returned after leaving a group.

api.v1.GetGroupInfoResponse.name: GetGroupInfoResponse
api.v1.GetGroupInfoResponse.description: GetGroupInfoResponse contains the group details with all members.

fields.name: members
fields.description: All group members (lightweight: user_id + role + joined_at).

fields.name: users
fields.description:
User info for all members, keyed by user_id. Clients join
members[i].user_id with this list for display.

api.v1.ListGroupsRequest.name: ListGroupsRequest
api.v1.ListGroupsRequest.description: ListGroupsRequest requests the current user's joined groups.

fields.name: after_id
fields.description:
Pagination anchor: only return groups with group_id > after_id.
Omit for the first page.

fields.name: limit
fields.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 50, max: 200).

api.v1.ListGroupsResponse.name: ListGroupsResponse
api.v1.ListGroupsResponse.description: ListGroupsResponse contains the user's joined groups.

fields.name: has_more
fields.description: Whether there are more groups beyond this page.

shared.v1.MediaFileInfo.name: MediaFileInfo
shared.v1.MediaFileInfo.description: MediaFileInfo contains file metadata returned after upload completion.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Image/video width in pixels (0 if not applicable).

fields.name: height
fields.description: Image/video height in pixels (0 if not applicable).

fields.name: duration_ms
fields.description: Audio/video duration in milliseconds (0 if not applicable).

fields.name: thumbnail_file_id
fields.description: Thumbnail file ID (empty if not generated).

fields.name: public_url
fields.description:
Permanent public URL. Only populated when purpose is AVATAR or
GROUP_AVATAR. Empty for MESSAGE purpose files.

api.v1.UploadFileRequest.name: UploadFileRequest
api.v1.UploadFileRequest.description: UploadFileRequest uploads a complete file in one request.

api.v1.UploadFileResponse.name: UploadFileResponse
api.v1.UploadFileResponse.description: UploadFileResponse contains the uploaded file metadata.

fields.name: file
fields.description:
Uploaded file metadata. For AVATAR/GROUP_AVATAR, public_url is
populated. For MESSAGE, use file_id with GetDownloadURL.

api.v1.InitUploadRequest.name: InitUploadRequest
api.v1.InitUploadRequest.description: InitUploadRequest initializes a chunked upload session.

api.v1.InitUploadResponse.name: InitUploadResponse
api.v1.InitUploadResponse.description: InitUploadResponse contains the upload session info.

fields.name: uploaded
fields.description: Bytes already uploaded (non-zero when resuming a previous session).

api.v1.UploadChunkResponse.name: UploadChunkResponse
api.v1.UploadChunkResponse.description: UploadChunkResponse is returned after a chunk is uploaded.

api.v1.CompleteUploadResponse.name: CompleteUploadResponse
api.v1.CompleteUploadResponse.description: CompleteUploadResponse contains the uploaded file metadata.

api.v1.GetDownloadURLRequest.name: GetDownloadURLRequest
api.v1.GetDownloadURLRequest.description: GetDownloadURLRequest requests a download URL for a private file.

api.v1.GetDownloadURLResponse.name: GetDownloadURLResponse
api.v1.GetDownloadURLResponse.description: GetDownloadURLResponse contains the time-limited download URL.

api.v1.SendMessageRequest.name: SendMessageRequest
api.v1.SendMessageRequest.description: SendMessageRequest sends a message to a conversation.

fields.name: client_message_id
fields.description: Client-generated message ID (for idempotency and dedup).

api.v1.SendMessageResponse.name: SendMessageResponse
api.v1.SendMessageResponse.description: SendMessageResponse is returned after the message is persisted.

api.v1.EditMessageRequest.name: EditMessageRequest
api.v1.EditMessageRequest.description: EditMessageRequest edits a previously sent message.

api.v1.EditMessageResponse.name: EditMessageResponse
api.v1.EditMessageResponse.description: EditMessageResponse is returned after the message is edited.

api.v1.DeleteMessagesRequest.name: DeleteMessagesRequest
api.v1.DeleteMessagesRequest.description: DeleteMessagesRequest deletes messages by ID list (local delete).

api.v1.DeleteMessagesResponse.name: DeleteMessagesResponse
api.v1.DeleteMessagesResponse.description: DeleteMessagesResponse is returned after messages are deleted.

api.v1.DeleteHistoryRequest.name: DeleteHistoryRequest
api.v1.DeleteHistoryRequest.description: DeleteHistoryRequest deletes all messages up to a given ID (local delete).

fields.name: up_to_message_id
fields.description: Delete up to and including this message ID.

api.v1.DeleteHistoryResponse.name: DeleteHistoryResponse
api.v1.DeleteHistoryResponse.description:
DeleteHistoryResponse is returned after history is deleted.
Uses waterline-based deletion (max_deleted_message_id), so no
precise count is available.

api.v1.RecallMessageResponse.name: RecallMessageResponse
api.v1.RecallMessageResponse.description: RecallMessageResponse is returned after the message is recalled.

api.v1.GetMessageRequest.name: GetMessageRequest
api.v1.GetMessageRequest.description: GetMessageRequest requests a single message by ID.

api.v1.GetMessageHistoryRequest.name: GetMessageHistoryRequest
api.v1.GetMessageHistoryRequest.description:
GetMessageHistoryRequest requests message history with ID-based cursor.
Set before_message_id for backward (older) pagination, or
after_message_id for forward (newer/incremental) pagination.
Omit both to start from the latest messages.

fields.name: before_message_id
fields.description:
Backward cursor: return messages with message_id < this value.
When has_more=true, use the smallest message_id from the response.

fields.name: after_message_id
fields.description:
Forward cursor: return messages with message_id > this value.
When has_more=true, use the largest message_id from the response.

fields.name: limit
fields.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 50, max: 200).

api.v1.GetMessageHistoryResponse.name: GetMessageHistoryResponse
api.v1.GetMessageHistoryResponse.description: GetMessageHistoryResponse contains the message history page.

fields.name: has_more
fields.description: Whether there are more messages beyond this page.

fields.name: related_users
fields.description:
Related user info referenced by the messages in this page.
Contains UserInfo for each distinct sender_id (and reply_to.sender_id)
appearing in the messages. Clients should merge these into their
local users_cache for rendering sender names and avatars.

api.v1.SubmitCardActionRequest.name: SubmitCardActionRequest
api.v1.SubmitCardActionRequest.description: SubmitCardActionRequest reports an Adaptive Card Action.Submit.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.description: Conversation ID containing the card message.

fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Message ID of the card message.

fields.name: action_data
fields.description:
Action data from Action.Submit (JSON string, ≤ 4 KB).
Contains the form input values and any static data defined
in the Action.Submit's data property.

fields.name: verb
fields.description:
Action verb identifier (optional). Maps to the Action.Submit's
"id" or custom "verb" property, allowing agents to distinguish
between multiple submit actions on the same card.

api.v1.SubmitCardActionResponse.name: SubmitCardActionResponse
api.v1.SubmitCardActionResponse.description: SubmitCardActionResponse is returned after the action is submitted.

api.v1.PushStreamDeltaRequest.name: PushStreamDeltaRequest
api.v1.PushStreamDeltaRequest.description: PushStreamDeltaRequest pushes an incremental delta to a streaming message.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.description: Conversation ID containing the streaming message.

fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Message ID of the streaming message (from SendMessageResponse).

fields.name: seq
fields.description:
Stream sequence number (agent-side auto-increment, starting from 1).
Server uses this for dedup and gap detection.

api.v1.PushStreamDeltaResponse.name: PushStreamDeltaResponse
api.v1.PushStreamDeltaResponse.description: PushStreamDeltaResponse is returned after the delta is pushed.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.description: Conversation ID containing the streaming message.

fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Message ID of the streaming message.

fields.name: entities
fields.description: Rich text entities for the accumulated text (@mentions, URLs, etc.).

api.v1.EndStreamResponse.name: EndStreamResponse
api.v1.EndStreamResponse.description: EndStreamResponse is returned after the stream is finalized.

api.v1.ErrorStreamRequest.name: ErrorStreamRequest
api.v1.ErrorStreamRequest.description: ErrorStreamRequest terminates a streaming message with an error.

fields.name: conversation_id
fields.description: Conversation ID containing the streaming message.

fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Message ID of the streaming message.

api.v1.ErrorStreamResponse.name: ErrorStreamResponse
api.v1.ErrorStreamResponse.description: ErrorStreamResponse is returned after the stream is terminated.

api.v1.AnswerCardActionRequest.name: AnswerCardActionRequest
api.v1.AnswerCardActionRequest.description: AnswerCardActionRequest responds to a card action submission.

fields.name: action_id
fields.description: Action ID from the webhook event.

fields.name: show_alert
fields.description: Whether to show as alert dialog (otherwise toast).

api.v1.AnswerCardActionResponse.name: AnswerCardActionResponse
api.v1.AnswerCardActionResponse.description: AnswerCardActionResponse is returned after the action is answered.

fields.name: is_sandbox
fields.description: Whether this is a sandbox environment token (APNs sandbox).

api.v1.RegisterTokenResponse.name: RegisterTokenResponse
api.v1.RegisterTokenResponse.description: RegisterTokenResponse is returned after the token is registered.

api.v1.UnregisterTokenResponse.name: UnregisterTokenResponse
api.v1.UnregisterTokenResponse.description: UnregisterTokenResponse is returned after the token is removed.

api.v1.ClearBadgeRequest.name: ClearBadgeRequest
api.v1.ClearBadgeRequest.description: ClearBadgeRequest clears the push notification badge count.

api.v1.ClearBadgeResponse.name: ClearBadgeResponse
api.v1.ClearBadgeResponse.description: ClearBadgeResponse is returned after the badge is cleared.

api.v1.GetDifferenceRequest.name: GetDifferenceRequest
api.v1.GetDifferenceRequest.description: GetDifferenceRequest requests updates after the given sn.

fields.name: sn
fields.description: The client's last known sync number.

api.v1.GetDifferenceResponse.name: GetDifferenceResponse
api.v1.GetDifferenceResponse.description: GetDifferenceResponse contains the updates and sync metadata.

fields.name: updates
fields.description: Ordered list of updates since the requested sn.

fields.name: sn
fields.description: The new sn after applying all returned updates.

fields.name: has_more
fields.description:
Whether more updates remain on the server. If true, the client
should call GetDifference again with the returned sn.

fields.name: update_too_long
fields.description:
Whether the gap is too large for incremental sync. If true, the
client should discard local state and perform a full resync.

api.v1.GetCurrentStateRequest.name: GetCurrentStateRequest
api.v1.GetCurrentStateRequest.description:
GetCurrentStateRequest is empty; the server identifies the user
from the authenticated session.

api.v1.GetCurrentStateResponse.name: GetCurrentStateResponse
api.v1.GetCurrentStateResponse.description: GetCurrentStateResponse contains the server's current sync state.

fields.name: state
fields.description: The server's current sync state for this user.

shared.v1.WebhookEvent.name: WebhookEvent
shared.v1.WebhookEvent.description:
WebhookEvent is the unified event envelope delivered to agent webhook
endpoints via HTTP POST with protojson serialization.

Message delivery model: Agents receive the same message stream as regular users. Group events (group membership changes, etc.) arrive as messages with MessageType GROUP, carrying structured GroupContent payloads.

fields.name: related_users
fields.description: Related user info referenced by the event (sender, operator, etc.).

fields.name: related_groups
fields.description: Related group info referenced by the event (for group events).

fields.name: message_event
fields.description: Message event payload (all message types including group events).

fields.name: card_action
fields.description: Card action event payload (Adaptive Card Action.Submit).

shared.v1.MessageEventPayload.name: MessageEventPayload
shared.v1.MessageEventPayload.description: MessageEventPayload wraps a full message envelope for webhook delivery.

shared.v1.CardActionPayload.name: CardActionPayload
shared.v1.CardActionPayload.description: CardActionPayload contains an Adaptive Card Action.Submit event.

shared.v1.ContactAddedPayload.name: ContactAddedPayload
shared.v1.ContactAddedPayload.description:
ContactAddedPayload is delivered when a user adds this agent as a
contact. The agent can use this to send a welcome message.

shared.v1.RemovedFromGroupPayload.name: RemovedFromGroupPayload
shared.v1.RemovedFromGroupPayload.description:
RemovedFromGroupPayload is delivered when the agent is removed from a
group by the group owner.

fields.name: group_id
fields.description: Group ID the agent was removed from.

fields.name: operator_id
fields.description: User ID of the operator who removed the agent.

shared.v1.GroupDissolvedPayload.name: GroupDissolvedPayload
shared.v1.GroupDissolvedPayload.description:
GroupDissolvedPayload is delivered when a group the agent belongs to
is dissolved by its owner.

fields.name: operator_id
fields.description: User ID of the owner who dissolved the group.

shared.v1.AgentClientFrame.name: AgentClientFrame
shared.v1.AgentClientFrame.description: AgentClientFrame is the upstream frame sent by an agent over WebSocket.

shared.v1.AgentAuthRequest.name: AgentAuthRequest
shared.v1.AgentAuthRequest.description: AgentAuthRequest carries the agent token for WebSocket authentication.

shared.v1.AgentServerFrame.name: AgentServerFrame
shared.v1.AgentServerFrame.description: AgentServerFrame is the downstream frame sent by the gateway to an agent.

shared.v1.AgentEventPush.name: AgentEventPush
shared.v1.AgentEventPush.description: AgentEventPush wraps a WebhookEvent for WebSocket delivery.

fields.name: event
fields.description:
Reuses the same WebhookEvent structure, ensuring consistent
business data between Webhook and WebSocket modes.

shared.v1.AccountType.name: AccountType
shared.v1.AccountType.description: AccountType distinguishes human users from agent accounts.

shared.v1.PushPlatform.name: PushPlatform
shared.v1.PushPlatform.description:
PushPlatform defines push notification platforms.
Only APNs and FCM are supported in the current version.
Desktop clients (Tauri) rely on the in-app long connection.

shared.v1.AgentVisibility.name: AgentVisibility
shared.v1.AgentVisibility.description: AgentVisibility defines agent discoverability and addability.

values.name: AGENT_VISIBILITY_PUBLIC
values.description: Agent is publicly listed in the directory. Any user can search and add.

values.name: AGENT_VISIBILITY_PRIVATE
values.description: Agent is private. Only the creator can use it (auto-added on creation).

shared.v1.AgentDeliveryMode.name: AgentDeliveryMode
shared.v1.AgentDeliveryMode.description: AgentDeliveryMode defines the event delivery mode for an agent.

values.name: AGENT_DELIVERY_MODE_WEBHOOK
values.description: Events delivered via Webhook HTTP POST.

shared.v1.FriendRequestStatus.name: FriendRequestStatus
shared.v1.FriendRequestStatus.description: FriendRequestStatus defines friend request lifecycle states.

api.v1.SearchAccountType.name: SearchAccountType
api.v1.SearchAccountType.description: SearchAccountType specifies which account types to include in search.

values.name: SEARCH_ACCOUNT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED
values.description: Unspecified. Searches all account types (users and agents).

values.name: CONVERSATION_ACTION_TYPE_DELETE
values.description:
Soft-delete conversation from the user's list. See
UpdateConversationAction RPC for the full delete lifecycle.

values.name: MESSAGE_TYPE_GROUP
values.description: Group event message (delivered to group conversation).

shared.v1.MessageEntityType.name: MessageEntityType
shared.v1.MessageEntityType.description: MessageEntityType defines rich text annotation types.

shared.v1.StreamPhase.name: StreamPhase
shared.v1.StreamPhase.description: StreamPhase defines streaming message lifecycle phases.

shared.v1.MediaPurpose.name: MediaPurpose
shared.v1.MediaPurpose.description:
MediaPurpose defines the intended usage of an uploaded file, which
determines storage visibility and URL generation strategy.

values.name: MEDIA_PURPOSE_MESSAGE
values.description:
Message attachment (private, time-limited URL with conversation-level
access control).

shared.v1.WebhookEventType.name: WebhookEventType
shared.v1.WebhookEventType.description:
WebhookEventType identifies the kind of webhook event.

Agents are first-class citizens in the message system. All message
types (text, media, group events, recalls) are
delivered as MESSAGE events containing a full MessageEnvelope.
This mirrors how regular users receive messages via long connection.

values.name: WEBHOOK_EVENT_TYPE_MESSAGE
values.description:
New message received. Covers all message types including group
events (group member changes, etc.) which are delivered as
MessageType GROUP within the envelope.

values.name: WEBHOOK_EVENT_TYPE_CARD_ACTION
values.description: Adaptive Card Action.Submit from a user.

values.name: WEBHOOK_EVENT_TYPE_CONTACT_ADDED
values.description: A user added this agent as a contact.

values.name: WEBHOOK_EVENT_TYPE_REMOVED_FROM_GROUP
values.description: Agent was removed from a group.

values.name: WEBHOOK_EVENT_TYPE_GROUP_DISSOLVED
values.description: A group the agent belongs to was dissolved.
